services: remodeling, roofing, handyman, flat roofing coatings
expenseDecisionTree: 1. Is this expense tied to a specific job? → Job Cost (assign job number)
2. Is this a recurring business subscription? → Overhead / Software
3. Is this a vehicle/fuel expense? → Vehicle Expense (assign vehicle)
4. Is this a tool or equipment purchase? → Equipment / Tools
5. Is this a material purchase? → Materials (assign job, apply 20% markup for client billing)
6. None of the above? → General Overhead (note the vendor and purpose)
mondayDashboardItems: Active jobs with budget vs actual
